title: Khoj RAG Enhancement - Hybrid Search, CRAG, Query Transformation

phases.name: CRAG Evaluation & Query Transformation - Quick Wins

tasks.description: Create RetrievalEvaluator class in processor/retrieval_evaluator.py with evaluate(query, chunks) returning CONFIDENT/AMBIGUOUS/NO_MATCH using gpt-4o-mini
tasks.acceptance: Evaluation returns correct classification, <300ms latency

tasks.description: Implement fallback in retrieval_evaluator.py: CONFIDENT->return chunks, AMBIGUOUS->lower threshold and re-search, NO_MATCH->return empty with warning
tasks.acceptance: Fallback triggers correctly for each classification

tasks.description: Create QueryTransformer class in processor/query_transformer.py with transform(query) returning [original, step_back] using gpt-4o-mini
tasks.acceptance: Generates 1-2 query variants via step-back prompting

tasks.description: Create rrf_fuse(results_lists, k=60, limit=10) function in utils/helpers.py returning sorted Entry list
tasks.acceptance: RRF correctly ranks and deduplicates by entry ID

tasks.description: Add 'from khoj.processor.retrieval_evaluator import RetrievalEvaluator' at top of routers/api_chat.py
tasks.acceptance: RetrievalEvaluator imported in api_chat.py

tasks.description: Add if settings.CRAG_ENABLED and max_similarity < 0.75: result = evaluator.evaluate() after vector search in api_chat.py
tasks.acceptance: CRAG gating logic added to chat flow

tasks.description: Add query_variants = transformer.transform(query) before embedding generation in api_chat.py when settings.QUERY_TRANSFORM_ENABLED
tasks.acceptance: QueryTransformer wired into search flow

tasks.description: Add fused_results = rrf_fuse([search_results_for_variant]) in api_chat.py when len(query_variants) > 1
tasks.acceptance: RRF fusion applied to variant results

tasks.description: Create tests/test_retrieval_evaluator.py and tests/test_query_transformer.py with mock LLM responses
tasks.acceptance: All Phase 1 components tested with >80% coverage

tasks.description: Add test_confident_fallback(), test_ambiguous_fallback(), test_no_match_fallback() to test_retrieval_evaluator.py
tasks.acceptance: Each classification branch tested separately

tasks.description: Create Django migration 0XXX_add_search_vector: AddField('Entry', 'search_vector', TSVectorField()), AddIndex(GinIndex(fields=['search_vector']))
tasks.acceptance: Migration creates search_vector tsvector column with GIN index

tasks.description: Create SparseEmbeddingGenerator in processor/sparse_embeddings.py using FlagEmbedding BGEM3FlagModel for lexical weights
tasks.acceptance: Sparse vectors generated using BGE-M3

tasks.description: Refactor existing vector search into dense_search(query_embedding, user, k=10) in search_type/text_search.py
tasks.acceptance: dense_search() wrapper returns list of (entry, distance) tuples

tasks.description: Create sparse_search(query_text, user, k=10) using Entry.objects.annotate(rank=SearchRank('search_vector')) in text_search.py - DEPENDS on 2.1
tasks.acceptance: sparse_search() wrapper returns list of (entry, rank) tuples

tasks.description: Create hybrid_search(query_text, query_embedding, user, k=10, alpha=0.6) calling dense_search and sparse_search, then rrf_fuse - DEPENDS on 2.3, 2.4, 1.4
tasks.acceptance: hybrid_search() returns combined results with configurable alpha

tasks.description: Add hybrid_alpha=FloatField(default=0.6) and hybrid_enabled=BooleanField(default=True) to database/models/SearchModelConfig
tasks.acceptance: Hybrid parameters exposed in SearchModelConfig model

tasks.description: Create management command: python manage.py populate_fts_index --batch-size=1000 - DEPENDS on 2.1
tasks.acceptance: Existing entries have tsvector populated

tasks.description: Create tests/test_hybrid_search.py with parameterized tests for alpha=0.3, 0.5, 0.7
tasks.acceptance: Hybrid search tested with various alpha values

tasks.description: Create Django migration 0XXX_add_context_summary: AddField('Entry', 'context_summary', models.TextField(blank=True, null=True))
tasks.acceptance: Migration adds context_summary TextField to Entry

tasks.description: Create ContextualChunker class in processor/contextual_chunker.py using gpt-4o-mini, temperature=0, max_tokens=60 - DEPENDS on 3.1
tasks.acceptance: Generates 1-2 sentence context per chunk in <500ms

tasks.description: Add chunker.summarize_chunk() call in processor/content/markdown/markdown_to_entries.py when flag enabled
tasks.acceptance: Markdown files get context summaries when CONTEXTUAL_CHUNKING_ENABLED=true

tasks.description: Add chunker.summarize_chunk() call in processor/content/pdf/pdf_to_entries.py when flag enabled
tasks.acceptance: PDF files get context summaries when flag enabled

tasks.description: Add chunker.summarize_chunk() call in processor/content/org_mode/org_to_entries.py when flag enabled
tasks.acceptance: Org-mode files get context summaries when flag enabled

tasks.description: Create expand_window(entry, window_size=2) in search_type/text_search.py fetching adjacent chunks
tasks.acceptance: Adjacent N chunks fetched correctly, grouped by file_id

tasks.description: Update processor/conversation/prompts.py to prepend entry.context_summary to reference text when available
tasks.acceptance: LLM receives context summaries in prompt

tasks.description: Create tests/test_contextual_chunker.py with mock LLM, rate limit (5 concurrent), error handling tests
tasks.acceptance: Contextual chunking tested with mock LLM and rate limiting

tasks.description: Create Django migration 0XXX_add_chunk_scale: AddField('Entry', 'chunk_scale', models.CharField(max_length=16, default='default'))
tasks.acceptance: Migration adds chunk_scale VARCHAR(16) with default 'default'

tasks.description: Modify processor/content/text_to_entries.py to create entries at multiple chunk_size values - DEPENDS on 4.1
tasks.acceptance: Documents chunked at 512, 1024, 2048 tokens with scale label

tasks.description: Create rrf_fuse_multi(sources: Dict[str, List[Result]], k=60, limit=10) in utils/helpers.py where sources keys are 'dense_512', 'sparse_1024', etc.
tasks.acceptance: rrf_fuse_multi() handles variants, scales, dense/sparse in single call

tasks.description: Add config flags to utils/config.py with specified defaults
tasks.acceptance: All features toggleable via Django settings with defaults: CRAG_ENABLED=True, QUERY_TRANSFORM_ENABLED=True, HYBRID_SEARCH_ENABLED=True, CONTEXTUAL_CHUNKING_ENABLED=False, MULTI_SCALE_ENABLED=False, RRF_K=60

tasks.description: Create routers/api_metrics.py with /api/rag/metrics endpoint
tasks.acceptance: GET /api/rag/metrics returns JSON: {latency_p50_ms, latency_p95_ms, crag_classifications: {confident: N, ambiguous: N, no_match: N}, cache_hit_rate: 0.X}

tasks.description: Create management command: python manage.py reindex_multi_scale --scales=512,1024,2048 --dry-run - DEPENDS on 4.1, 4.2
tasks.acceptance: Existing entries re-indexed at multiple scales

tasks.description: Create tests/test_rag_pipeline_e2e.py testing query flow with CRAG + transformation + hybrid + multi-scale
tasks.acceptance: End-to-end pipeline tested with all features enabled

tasks.description: Add ReverseMigration operations to each schema migration file (0XXX_add_search_vector, 0XXX_add_context_summary, 0XXX_add_chunk_scale)
tasks.acceptance: Reverse migrations remove columns and indexes cleanly

tasks.description: Create docs/migration_rollback.md with steps: pg_dump, apply reverse migration, verify row count, verify query results
tasks.acceptance: Backup/restore steps documented and validated

tasks.description: Create tests/test_migration_compatibility.py verifying: Entry.objects.filter(user=user), search_with_embeddings(), FTS search, agent isolation
tasks.acceptance: Existing queries return same results post-migration

tasks.description: Create tests/test_rollback.py that applies migration, inserts 100 test entries, runs reverse migration, verifies columns removed and row count preserved
tasks.acceptance: Rollback tested on test database with data integrity verified

tasks.description: Evaluate tri-vector by running benchmarks against Phase 1-4 baseline - ONLY PROCEED if all criteria met
tasks.acceptance: Decision document compares baseline vs enhanced: MAP@10, latency_p95, cost_per_1k_queries with criteria: MAP@10 gain > 0.05 AND latency_p95 increase < 200ms AND cost increase < 50%

tasks.description: If approved: Add TriVectorEmbeddingGenerator in processor/tri_vector_embeddings.py using FlagEmbedding BGEM3FlagModel
tasks.acceptance: BGEM3FlagModel produces dense (1024-dim), sparse (token weights), colbert (token embeddings)

tasks.description: If approved: Create migration AddField('Entry', 'colbert_vector', models.BinaryField(blank=True, null=True))
tasks.acceptance: colbert_vector BYTEA stores compressed token embeddings with nbits=2

tasks.description: If approved: Create tri_vector_search() in text_search.py computing weighted sum of normalized scores
tasks.acceptance: Tri-vector search with weights w_dense=0.4, w_sparse=0.2, w_colbert=0.4
